form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Blue Tiara at this track last start over 300m (17.92). Likely to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Blue Tiara at this track last start over 300m (17.92). Likely to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost ground entering the first turn.
Checked in the back straight, contacted hind quarters and lost ground.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Mulwee Princess beaten 12 lengths (18.43). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Mulwee Princess beaten 12 lengths (18.43). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 300m at this track on April 15. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish the race over 300m at this track on April 15. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room soon after the start and fell as a result.
Was bumped on the hindquarters rounding the home turn.
Was bumped and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 300m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 300m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 15 over 300m at this track behind Zipping Nuttall beaten 4.5 lengths (17.90) in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 15 over 300m at this track behind Zipping Nuttall beaten 4.5 lengths (17.90) in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 300m at this track. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 300m at this track. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and galloped ungainly throughout the race.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.20) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 13 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Can feature with the right run.
